description: Curated golden cases for BriefAlpha pipeline regression. Each case carries an evidence_pool_input snapshot (synthetic RawItem-shaped dicts) + expected metrics. The runner in `tests/golden/runner.py` feeds the pool into the 9 pipeline stages, calls Stage A/B/C via the LLM wrapper (stub provider in CI), runs the validator on each LLM response, and emits an aggregate metrics report at `tests/golden/golden_metrics.json`.

cases.summary: NVDA earnings beat reported by 4 sources, all directional alignment.

evidence_pool_input.title: NVDA 8-K: Q4 revenue beat consensus by 5%
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: NVIDIA reported revenue of US$22.1B, beating consensus of US$21.0B by 5%. Data center segment revenue rose 18% sequentially. Guidance raised for Q1.

evidence_pool_input.title: Nvidia beats forecasts, raises guidance
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Reuters: Nvidia beat Q4 expectations and raised forward guidance, citing strong AI infrastructure demand. Shares up 6% afterhours.

evidence_pool_input.title: Nvidia beat: data-center revenue up 18%
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Bloomberg: data center revenue rose 18% sequentially, beating Street estimates. Margins expanded. Q1 outlook raised.

evidence_pool_input.title: NVDA after-hours +6.0%
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Last 6%; previous close $920. Volume above 30-day average. Sentiment positive on guidance raise.

cases.summary: NVDA Q1 guidance cut. Reuters quotes 8%, Bloomberg quotes 10% — flagged conflict.

evidence_pool_input.title: NVDA 8-K: Q1 guidance cut
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: NVIDIA cut Q1 data-center revenue guidance citing supply constraints. Magnitude undisclosed in 8-K.

evidence_pool_input.title: Nvidia cuts Q1 guidance by 8%
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Reuters: Nvidia cut Q1 data-center revenue outlook by 8% versus consensus, citing supply constraints. Shares down afterhours.

evidence_pool_input.title: Nvidia trims Q1 outlook ~10%
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Bloomberg: Nvidia trimmed Q1 data-center outlook approximately 10% — magnitude differs from Reuters' 8% read.

evidence_pool_input.title: NVDA after-hours -6.0%
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Last -6%; previous close $920. Volume well above 30-day average; selling concentrated post-guidance.

cases.summary: Williams 'mildly restrictive' speech; rates desk reaction in 3 sources.

evidence_pool_input.title: Williams: policy 'mildly restrictive'; one more hike on the table
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: NY Fed President John Williams said policy is 'mildly restrictive' and a further hike of 25 bps cannot be ruled out if core inflation stalls.

evidence_pool_input.title: Treasuries sell off after Williams comments
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Reuters: 10-year UST yield rose 6 bps to 4.45%; market pricing one more hike with 38% probability.

evidence_pool_input.title: TLT close -1.2%
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: TLT closed -1.2%; long-end UST under pressure on hawkish Williams.

cases.summary: Light news flow; expected output reverts to base_case + summary only.

evidence_pool_input.title: SPY +0.10%
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Index flat; volume light; no major sector moves.

evidence_pool_input.title: Wall Street logs quiet session
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Reuters: equities edged higher in a quiet session; no notable single-stock movers.

cases.summary: Single-source breaking — should mark requires_review until corroborated.

evidence_pool_input.title: Reports of fab fire affecting NVDA supplier
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Single-source report of a fab fire affecting an NVDA supplier; details unconfirmed; awaiting corroboration.

evidence_pool_input.title: NVDA -0.8% afterhours
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Light afterhours move; volume below average.

cases.summary: PCE prints in line; macro_pulse only.

evidence_pool_input.title: PCE 2.6% YoY, in line
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Headline PCE rose 2.6% YoY, matching consensus; core PCE 2.7% YoY, in line.

evidence_pool_input.title: PCE in line; markets little changed
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Reuters: PCE in line with expectations; rates and equities little changed post-print.

cases.summary: Tencent buyback authorization; should pull HKEX 7:30 HKT filing as primary.

evidence_pool_input.title: 0700.HK: enlargement of share buyback authorisation
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: 0700.HK announces enlargement of share buyback authorisation by 50%; aggregate value expanded to HK$200B.

evidence_pool_input.title: Tencent expands buyback authorisation
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Reuters: Tencent enlarged buyback authorisation; supportive for HK internet sector valuation.

cases.summary: Revenue warning 8-K — official tier wins primary slot.

evidence_pool_input.title: AAPL 8-K: revenue warning
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: AAPL filed an 8-K disclosing a Q3 revenue shortfall vs. internal plan; cites currency and demand softness.

evidence_pool_input.title: Apple warns on Q3 revenue
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Reuters: Apple warned on Q3 revenue, citing currency and softer demand. Shares down afterhours.

cases.summary: Goldman PDF mentions BIDU (external) — pool ingests with warning, no universe expansion.

evidence_pool_input.title: Goldman China Internet — BIDU initiation
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: Goldman initiates BIDU at Buy with HK$165 target; cross-reads bullish for tencent and Alibaba ecosystems.

evidence_pool_input.title: Goldman China Internet — sector valuations
evidence_pool_input.excerpt: China internet sector trades at 14x forward earnings, modest discount to historical average.
